modelCoverage.compareLaneReason: Doppler uses the local AF16 INT4-PLE weights-ref sibling over the Gemma 4 E2B INT4 PLE weight pack; TJS uses standard ONNX q4f16. This lane is local compute-throughput evidence, not hosted-release evidence.

Doppler and the paired Transformers.js ONNX q4f16 runner both produce coherent Gemma 4 output, but current greedy text is not exact-match; this lane is claimable for compute-throughput comparisons, not correctness-parity claims.

Doppler uses INT4 per-row PLE quantization (closer to TFLite shape); TJS uses standard ONNX q4f16. Both produce coherent Gemma 4 output on matching prompts — lane remains performance_comparable as compute-throughput comparison is meaningful.
Embedding models use a separate workload contract and are not part of the text-generation compare lane.
No canonical Transformers.js mapping is configured for this bilingual TranslateGemma artifact.

localClaimLanes.statusReason: Local execution is verified; promote only after fresh cross-engine compare receipts pin the competitor artifact hash and summary SVG.

Fresh 2026-06-27 15-run throughput receipts cover p064, p256, and p512 on Chromium/browser, Node, and Bun with exact output match, nonzero decode, pinned local manifest hash 4bb1af0de9a0367a3d036e485622917209b54b4ed2f877048b9ce015ea8c1511, and the declared 8x8 overlapped readback cadence. Doppler leads TJS q4 on every p064 surface and every p512 surface, and leads the p256 browser surface. The lane remains candidate because p256 Node and Bun decode are TJS-leading despite passing correctness and throughput gates, with command recording as the dominant Doppler bottleneck. Node and Bun comparisons also carry the compare tool's cross-surface warning because TJS still runs in Chromium.

Local reference execution is verified and p064 parity compare evidence is local-comparable under the explicit Gemma 4 product-format output policy; promotion still requires pinned competitor artifact hash, summary SVG, and broader workload/backend coverage.
Local execution is verified; promote only after fresh cross-engine compare receipts pin the competitor artifact hash and summary SVG.

Local browser execution is verified and fresh local cross-engine compare receipts cover p064 and p256 with exact output match against Transformers.js q4f16. The p512 local claim-lane receipt remains pending; the separate hosted quickstart p512 receipt is tracked outside this local artifact lane.
Local execution is verified; promote only after fresh cross-engine compare receipts pin the competitor artifact hash and summary SVG.
